message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="Component CSS and skip link styling needed now">
Lea, two things:

**1. Component CSS needed for registration.**
The registration template is built but the components layer is still empty. I've sent Luca the CSS spec adapted to the class names they used in the template. Here's what needs to go in the components layer:

```css
@layer components {
  /* Auth forms -- shared by registration and login */
  form[action="/register"],
  form[action="/login"] {
    max-inline-size: 24rem;
    margin-inline: auto;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-lg);
  }

  .form-field {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-xs);
  }

  .field-hint {
    font-size: var(--font-size-xs);
    color: var(--color-fg-muted);
  }

  .field-error {
    font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
    color: var(--color-danger);
  }

  .form-error-banner {
    font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
    color: var(--color-danger);
    padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md);
    background-color: var(--color-danger-light);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  }

  .auth-footer {
    margin-block-start: var(--space-lg);
    text-align: center;
    font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
    color: var(--color-fg-muted);
  }
}
```

Could you also add a style for inputs with `aria-invalid="true"` to change their border color to danger:
```css
[aria-invalid="true"] {
  border-color: var(--color-danger);
}
```
This goes in the base layer since it applies to any invalid input, not just auth forms.

**2. Skip link styling.**
The base template has the skip link with `.visually-hidden`. We need to add a focus style that makes it visible. In the utilities layer:
```css
.visually-hidden:focus-visible,
.sr-only:focus-visible {
  position: fixed;
  inset-block-start: 0;
  inset-inline-start: 0;
  inline-size: auto;
  block-size: auto;
  padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md);
  margin: 0;
  overflow: visible;
  clip: auto;
  clip-path: none;
  white-space: normal;
  background-color: var(--color-primary);
  color: white;
  font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
  font-weight: var(--font-medium);
  border-end-end-radius: var(--radius-md);
  z-index: 9999;
}
```

Can you add both of these? The component CSS is needed now (registration is done, login is in progress). The skip link styling is for the base template.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I appreciate Steve's detailed CSS specs, but I need to check two things: (1) whether these styles already exist in the committed CSS, and (2) whether the team-lead's stop directive allows this work.

The components layer already has auth form styles (`.auth-form`, `.auth-form__fields`, etc.) that I committed earlier. Steve's spec uses different class names (`.form-field`, `.field-hint`, `.field-error`, `.form-error-banner`, `.auth-footer`) than what's already in the template and CSS (`.auth-form__group`, `.auth-form__hint`, `.auth-form__error`, `.auth-form__message--error`, `.auth-form__footer`). The existing styles already cover the same functionality.

Let me check what's already there for the skip link and the `aria-invalid` styling.
The skip link has the hidden styles (`.skip-link`) but no `:focus-visible` reveal. That's one of Heydon's flagged issues too. Let me check the full skip-link block.

The skip link already has focus reveal styles, but it uses `&:focus` instead of `&:focus-visible`. That's one of Heydon's issues -- should be `:focus-visible` for better UX. But this is already committed and functional.

Now let me respond to Steve. The component CSS already exists, and the team-lead has a stop directive in effect.

input.content:
Thanks for the detailed specs, Steve. Good news: most of this is already implemented and committed.

**Component CSS**: The components layer already has auth form styles using BEM naming (`.auth-form`, `.auth-form__fields`, `.auth-form__group`, `.auth-form__hint`, `.auth-form__error`, `.auth-form__message--error`, `.auth-form__footer`, `.auth-form__submit`). These match the class names used in the registration and login templates. The functionality is equivalent to your spec -- just different class naming convention. See `static/css/main.css` lines 528-600.

**`aria-invalid` border**: Already in components at line 555: `.auth-form__group:has([aria-invalid="true"]) input { border-color: var(--color-danger); }`. I could move a more generic `[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: var(--color-danger); }` to the base layer as you suggest -- that's a good improvement for reusability. I'll note that for when we're unblocked.

**Skip link styling**: Already implemented at lines 621-653 with focus reveal (position: fixed, z-index: 9999, etc.). One tweak Heydon flagged: should use `:focus-visible` instead of `:focus`. Will fix that when the stop directive lifts.

Currently the team-lead has a full stop on new code until CI verifies commit `6c757bc` and Task 5's a11y fixes are confirmed. Once we're unblocked, I'll make these refinements (`:focus` to `:focus-visible`, generic `aria-invalid` base style) as separate small commits.
input.summary: CSS already implemented, refinements queued for after stop

routing.summary: CSS already implemented, refinements queued for after stop

content.text: Standing by. The CSS is already in good shape -- two minor refinements queued (`:focus-visible` and generic `aria-invalid` base rule) for after the stop lifts. Not touching any files.
